'''Villar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] who often aided the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A skilled fighter who excelled at [[Spy/Legends|espionage]], Villar was a typical member of his [[Species/Legends|species]]. He longed to see [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], but such travels required [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]]. Villar turned to the intelligence business, gathering information on his journeys and selling it to highest bidder. Usually, the Devaronian sold whatever knowledge he had acquired to the Empire.

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]], Villar held a desire to travel throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. As exploration was a costly venture, he needed access to [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Rebellion" /> Forced to find an occupation to finance his hobby, Villar became an [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]]<ref name="Guide">[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> and collected intelligence during his journeys to offer to the highest bidder—a practice that usually put him in the services of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The Empire's patronage allowed Villar to continue to explore the galaxy.<ref name="Rebellion" />

==Personality and traits==
A typical Devaronian<ref name="Rebellion" /> and a skilled warrior,<ref name="Guide" /> Villar yearned to see the galaxy<ref name="Rebellion" /> like most male members of his species,<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> but his wanderlust required him to take on a profession capable of financing his journeys.<ref name="Rebellion" /> To that end, Villar put his espionage talents to use as an information broker,<ref name="Guide" /> obtaining information on his endeavors and selling it to whomever was willing to pay the highest price.<ref name="Rebellion" />

==Behind the scenes==
Villar first appeared in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|PC game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] as one of several Imperial-aligned characters available to the player.<ref name="Rebellion" /> In the game, Villar boasts a high success rate for missions to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]-held [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. The Devaronian also possesses an ability to design facilities, which makes him one of the Empire's most valuable<ref name="Guide" /> non-[[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]]<ref name="Rebellion" /> characters.<ref name="Guide" />
